triggers.description: When CARDNAME enters and whenever it deals combat damage to a player, create a Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")
When CARDNAME enters and whenever it deals combat damage to a player, create a Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")
Whenever you discard a card, put a +1/+1 counter on NICKNAME.
